mainEntity.name: Best AI tools for Houston attorney content creation and keyword research?
mainEntity.text: Best AI tools for Houston attorney content creation and keyword research?

acceptedAnswer.text: Claude for long-form blogs, Gemini for Texas-specific keywords, Perplexity for fact-checking Houston case law, ChatGPT for FAQ drafts.

suggestedAnswer.text: Houston lawyers leverage Claude 3.5 for 2k-word practice area pages citing Texas statutes. Gemini clusters long-tail queries like 'Houston truck accident settlement.' Verify with Perplexity to avoid hallucinations. Free tiers suffice starters; pro versions $20/mo. Integrate outputs with human edit for E-E-A-T.

name: Top AI Tools for Houston Lawyers
description: Claude for long-form blogs, Gemini for Texas-specific keywords, Perplexity for fact-checking Houston case law, ChatGPT for FAQ drafts.
